# Getting paid shouldn't cost you a relationship.

I've seen too many freelancers, founders, and office managers lose sleep over unpaid invoices. Or worse, damage client relationships just trying to get paid. After 10+ years building software for others, I decided to tackle this one myself.

That's why I'm building [**Yetty**](https://www.linkedin.com/company/getyetty).

---

## My story

### Building Yetty

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/getyetty">
  <picture>
    <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="assets/yetty-logo-light.svg">
    <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: light)" srcset="assets/yetty-logo-dark.svg">
    <img src="assets/yetty-logo-dark.svg" alt="Yetty" width="120">
  </picture>
</a>

An invoice follow-up tool that's smart, human, and kind. It reduces payment delays by 40%, saves 80% of follow-up time, and prevents 90% of disputes. No debt collectors, no awkward emails. Just the right message, at the right time, with the right tone.

[Discover Yetty →](https://www.linkedin.com/company/getyetty)

### Shaping Storybook

<a href="https://storybook.js.org/"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Storybook-FF4785?style=flat-square&logo=storybook&logoColor=white" alt="Storybook"></a>

I was a **core team member of [Storybook](https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook)** from 2019 to 2022. I shipped features, improved CI/CD pipelines, and helped shape the roadmap of a tool used by thousands of teams. That's where I learned what it takes to build something people actually rely on.

### Making things run at Gravitee

<a href="https://www.gravitee.io/"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Gravitee-ea3527?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white" alt="Gravitee"></a>

I spent 3 years at [Gravitee](https://www.gravitee.io/), working on their core API Management platform. I shipped new features, merged tightly coupled repositories into a monorepo, set up visual regression testing with Chromatic, and reworked the release process to go from 1 day to 20 minutes. I also revamped CI pipelines to integrate all automated tests across projects.

### Passing it on

<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Mines_Saint--Etienne-5F259F?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white" alt="Mines Saint-Etienne">

I'm a part-time teacher at my alma mater, [Mines Saint-Etienne](https://www.mines-stetienne.fr/) (cycle ISMIN). I run two courses for Master's students:

| | Course | What we cover |
|---|---|---|
| 🌐 | **Web Development** | TypeScript, NestJS, MongoDB, Cloud Deployment |
| 📱 | **Mobile App Design** | Kotlin, Android development |

Building the next generation of engineers is just as important as building products.
